sessions.intent: Fix LLM tests and Identity test failures

before.assumptions: Identity 7/10 pass, LLM tests all throw not implemented
before.risk: Builder may convert LLM test logic

sessions.intent: Revise everything_is_data.md proposal based on design conversation

before.assumptions: Original proposal has CRTP constraint, __ prefix, DataList. Conversation refined all of these.
before.risk: Low - proposal document only, no code changes.

sessions.plan: Rewrite everything_is_data.md with: Data<T> without CRTP, . vs ! navigation, DeclaredOnly, registered navigators, no special DataList class.

actions.context: Complete rewrite of proposal incorporating design decisions from architecture conversation.

sessions.intent: Replace all CreateContext() usage with app.Context, remove CreateContext from App

before.assumptions: CreateContext creates orphan contexts. app.Context is canonical.

sessions.plan: Remove CreateContext from App/this.cs. Update all test files to use app.Context.

actions.context: Replaced all CreateContext usage with app.Context

after.notes: All CreateContext usage removed. Build succeeds with 0 errors.

sessions.intent: Replace engine.RunSteps() calls with steps.RunAsync() in tests after RunSteps removal from App

before.assumptions: RunSteps was removed from App.@this. Tests still call it. OBP says steps own their execution.
before.risk: Low - mechanical refactor, same pattern at every call site.

sessions.plan: Replace _app.RunSteps(steps, context) with steps.RunAsync(context) in 3 test files.

actions.context: Replaced all engine.RunSteps / _app.RunSteps calls with steps.RunAsync(context)

after.notes: All 14 call sites updated across 3 files.

sessions.intent: Full blue+red team security audit of new App architecture (809 changed production files)

before.assumptions: Major architectural refactor from Runtime2 to App namespace. Same threat model (user-sovereign). Need to verify all previous security patterns carried over correctly and assess new attack surfaces.
before.risk: High surface area — 809 production files changed. New execution dispatch, new actor model, new variable system, new event lifecycle.

sessions.plan: Blue team: map 10 attack surface areas. Red team: describe vectors, severity, exploit sketches. Cross-reference against previous branch findings. Write security-report.json, verdict.json, summary.md, result.md.

actions.context: Full security audit: 10 attack surface areas, 12 findings (2 high, 4 medium, 6 low). Verdict: FAIL.

after.notes: Verdict FAIL. 2 HIGH: (1) Binding.Run missing try-finally permanently disables event guards, (2) variable expansion from untrusted sources via %!app%. 4 MEDIUM: header injection, event timeout gaps, LLM cache isolation, /system/ path fallback. 6 LOW. Signing, CallStack, decompression, LLM tool whitelist all solid.

sessions.intent: Fresh-eyes test quality review after coder fixed v4 findings

before.assumptions: Coder added 31 tests covering 4 critical gaps. Need to verify fix quality and do fresh-eyes on unreviewed tests.
before.risk: New tests may be shallow. Previously unreviewed test files may have false-green patterns.

sessions.plan: Verify coder fixes, deep-read new tests, fresh-eyes on 9 unreviewed test files, production code review for untested paths, exhaustive error/check.cs path mapping.

actions.context: Verified coder's 31 new tests. GoalReturnTests excellent. ErrorCheckTests achieves 100% line coverage but retry loop tested with empty actions, goal execution never verified.
Fresh-eyes: ForeachTests critical false-green (iteration never verified). OperatorTests biased toward true. VerifyActionTests excellent. CallStack tests weak.
Production code review: foreach ignores Returned flag, GoalSteps condition detection fragile, CopyDirectory has no exception handling, streaming error paths untested.

after.notes: 4 critical false-greens found: foreach, error retry, error goal, events. GoalSteps condition detection fragile. Cache still 0%. Verdict: needs-fixes.

sessions.intent: Cross-cutting integrity audit — find what file-level, test, and security reviewers missed

before.assumptions: Codeanalyzer approved file-level, tester found false-greens, security approved fixes. Need to check cross-file contracts and gaps between reviewers.
before.risk: High surface area (809 files). Cross-file contract breaks are the most dangerous class of bug on this branch.

sessions.plan: Read all bot reports. Verify 3 security fixes. Trace cross-file contracts: skipInfrastructure callers, foreach Returned propagation, condition detection coupling, Data.Clone family. Run tests. Write findings.

actions.context: Read all previous bot reports to understand what was already checked and what verdicts were given.
Verified all 3 security fixes are code-complete. Found all 3 lack test coverage.
Traced Returned flag contract: goal.return sets it, GoalSteps propagates it, Goal decrements ReturnDepth. foreach IGNORES it — critical contract break.
Traced skipInfrastructure usage across all Resolve() callers. Found Channels/this.cs:129 missing skipInfrastructure — second untrusted-input path the security fix missed.
Data.Clone() shallow-copies Signature. Goal.Goals lazy-assigns Parent. Both minor architectural smells.

after.notes: Verdict FAIL. 2 critical: foreach ignores Returned (cross-file contract break), skipInfrastructure missing on channel output. 2 major: security fixes without tests, fragile condition detection. 2 minor. Architecture is strong overall.
